headline: Is Apollo Global Management (APO) Pricing Reflect Its Recent Share Rebound And Earnings Outlook
summary: Wondering whether Apollo Global Management at around US$128.72 is offering value or asking too much of your portfolio? This article breaks down what that price tag really implies. The stock has moved 3.2% over the last 7 days and 15.5% over the last 30 days, while the year-to-date return of a 12.2% decline and 1-year return of a 5.2% decline sit against a 3-year return of 133.1% and a 5-year return of 150.2%. Recent coverage has focused on Apollo Global Management's role as a large...
